slides.title: Campaign strategy
slides.subtitle: Replace with the campaign promise, target audience and decision needed.
slides.no_claims_reason: Cover slide promise must be supported by later claim slides.

visual_aid.purpose: Set campaign mood without pretending the image is evidence.

speaker_notes.key_message: The audience should know the campaign decision this deck is about.

slides.title: The campaign exists because three signals changed

left.title: Signal 01
body: Replace with metric, period and source.

right.title: Implication
body: Replace with the business risk or opportunity.

visual_aid.purpose: Use numbered rows or paired cards to make the campaign need concrete.

speaker_notes.key_message: Do not sell the campaign before the audience believes the problem.

slides.title: The audience insight changes the message

left.title: Audience behavior
body: Replace with the observed behavior, segment and evidence.

right.title: Campaign wedge
body: Replace with the message or channel decision this insight creates.

visual_aid.purpose: Connect audience evidence to message strategy.

speaker_notes.key_message: The campaign strategy should follow from an audience insight, not taste.

slides.title: Execution is staged around launch, learning and conversion
body: Replace each phase with owner, output and success signal.
slides.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  A[Setup] --> B[Launch]
  B --> C[Optimize]
  C --> D[Final push]
  D --> E[Report]

visual_aid.purpose: Show campaign phases without overloading each phase.

speaker_notes.key_message: A timeline should prove control and learning, not list busy work.

slides.title: Budget follows the channels most likely to convert

visual_aid.purpose: Use a table or bar chart for categorical budget allocation.

speaker_notes.key_message: Budget allocation needs a reason, not only a number.
talk_track: Name the metric that will judge it.

slides.title: The target persona makes the campaign concrete

left.title: Primary audience
body: Replace with segment, need, trigger and channel.

right.title: Persona spotlight
body: Replace with realistic persona details backed by research, not stereotypes.

speaker_notes.key_message: Persona should focus message and channel choices.

slides.title: Success is measured by leading and lagging indicators

visual_aid.purpose: Make KPI definitions and measurement method visible.

speaker_notes.key_message: Metrics must define what counts, when it counts, and how it is measured.

slides.title: Approve the campaign, owners and checkpoint
slides.quote: Decision needed: budget, timeline, owner and review date.
slides.no_claims_reason: Decision instruction rather than a factual claim.

speaker_notes.key_message: The close should leave no ambiguity about the requested action.
